world.title: 1 killed in Israeli strike in southern Lebanon on 1st full day of ceasefire deal
world.description: An Israeli drone strike killed one person in southern Lebanon on Friday, the first full day of a U.S.-brokered truce meant to end hostilities between Israel and the militant group Hezbollah, paramedics in the area and the head of a local hospital told Reuters.

world.title: The Weekly Volcanic Activity Report: April 9-15, 2026
world.description: New activity/unrest was reported for 3 volcanoes from April 9 to 15, 2026. During the same period, ongoing activity was reported for 17 volcanoes.
world.source: The Watchers - Watching the world evolve and transform

world.title: EU to game out bloc’s mutual assistance clause in case of attack
world.description: The exercise comes after Cyprus was targeted by drones during the war between Iran, Israel and the United States.

world.title: Japan reveals new name for 40C-and-hotter days after blistering summer
world.description: The term - kokushobi - translates to "cruelly hot", "brutally hot" or "severely hot", and comes after Japan's hottest summer on record.

world.title: Oil's well that ends well? Trump claims nuke deal with Iran to end Hormuz horror

world.title: Europe to accelerate effort to secure Hormuz despite Trump’s order to ‘STAY AWAY’
world.description: More than 30 leaders joined a video conference call on Friday to map out an international mission to secure the Strait of Hormuz.

world.title: Central Asia Steps Up Its Digital Agenda: Justin Sun in Kyrgyzstan
world.description: In recent years, Kyrgyzstan has been gradually moving onto a new development trajectory, shaping its image as a country open to innovation, investment, and modern financial technologies. Against this backdrop, growing interest from global business leaders and tech billionaires is drawing particular attention.

world.title: Iran says it still controls Hormuz transit, warns of response to US blockade
world.description: Iran’s foreign ministry said on Friday transit through the Strait of Hormuz remains under the Islamic Republic's control and subject to its coordination, warning that any continued US naval blockade would violate the ceasefire and prompt a response.

business.title: Rachel Reeves to raise windfall tax on low-carbon electricity generators
business.description: Chancellor aims to curb households’ rising bills as she consults on reforms to weaken link between gas and electricity prices

business.title: Quebec pilot killed in crash at N.Y. airport remembered at visitation
business.description: Captain Antoine Forest, who died in a plane crash at New York's LaGuardia airport last month, is being remembered Friday in his hometown of Coteau-du-Lac, Que.

business.title: Ecolab’s US$4.75b Loan And Frigeo Deal Reframe Growth And Valuation
business.description:
Ecolab (NYSE:ECL) has entered into a large, unsecured delayed draw term loan agreement totaling $4.75b.
The company plans to use the facility to fund its acquisition of Frigeo Holdings LLC.
The financing and acquisition together represent a significant expansion move for Ecolab.
Ecolab, a major player in water, hygiene, and infection prevention solutions, is adding a sizable transaction to its corporate story with the planned Frigeo Holdings LLC acquisition. Recent coverage around NYSE:ECL...

business.title: CoreWeave (CRWV) Is Up 30.0% After New AI Cloud Deals And $4.5 Billion Debt Financing - What's Changed
business.description:
In recent days, CoreWeave completed and expanded multiple private offerings of its 9.750% senior notes due 2031, raising an additional US$1.00 billion at a price of 102% on top of an earlier US$1.75 billion tranche, while also issuing US$3.50 billion of 1.75% convertible notes due 2032.
Alongside these financings, new multi-year AI cloud agreements with Meta Platforms, Anthropic and a roughly US$6.00 billion commitment from Jane Street, plus Jane Street’s US$1.00 billion equity purchase, are...

business.title: Bay Area-based Philz Coffee reversing course, adding Pride flags back to all of its locations
business.description: Bay Area-based Philz Coffee is reversing course and adding back Pride flags to all of its locations.

business.title: Expert analyzes potential new pancreatic cancer breakthrough
business.description: Paul Oberstein of NYU Langone's Perlmutter Cancer Center discusses the stunning results of a Revolution Medicines drug trial on STAT's Readout Loud podcast.

business.title: “We can’t continue to be a local champion”- GCB Bank targets Liberia expansion
business.description: GCB Bank PLC is pursuing an ambitious regional expansion strategy, with plans to acquire one of Liberia’s largest banks as it seeks to reposition itself as a cross-border financial institution.

business.title: GCB Bank PLC to acquire Liberia’s third
business.description: Beyond Liberia, GCB Bank PLC is also exploring expansion opportunities in other West African markets, including The Gambia and Burkina Faso.

science.title: Volcanoes may have cooled Earth in a way scientists didn’t expect
science.description: Ash from ancient eruptions may have driven cooling on Earth by fertilizing oceans, boosting algal blooms, and pulling carbon from the air.

science.title: Scientists Discover a Hidden Giant Magma Reservoir Nestled Just 15 Kilometers Beneath Tuscany's Surface
science.description: A massive magma reservoir is secretly waiting beneath Italy’s peaceful landscape. With no eruptions in sight, scientists are scrambling to figure out why this enormous force remains dormant.

science.title: Life Beyond Biosignatures: A New Method In The Search For Life
science.description: Researchers from the Earth-Life Science Institute (ELSI) and National Institute for Basic Biology have developed a new method to detect extraterrestrial life without relying on traditional biosignatures. By modelling how life might spread between planets, they demonstrate that life could be detected through statistical patterns across planetary populations rather than on individual planets. This

science.title: Researchers discover how cell membrane composition drives cancer proliferation
science.description: Cells are enveloped by a lipid membrane that gives them structure and provides a barrier between the cell and its environment.

science.title: Back on Earth, Jeremy Hansen describes his long journey in space

ai.title: Backup calling, direct voicemail features in smartphones originated in India: Samsung official
ai.description: Samsung launched the Galaxy S26 series smartphone in February, which is the company's third AI smartphone.

ai.title: Anthropic CEO meeting White House chief of staff
ai.description: Dario Amodei, CEO of AI company Anthropic, is meeting with White House Chief of Staff Susie Wiles Friday amid a lawsuit against the administration.

ai.title: Intel Core Series 3 Wildcat Lake launches to challenge Apple's $599 MacBook Neo
ai.description: Intel's Wildcat Lake chips bring 40 TOPS AI performance to budget laptops on the 18A node, but MacBook Neo benchmarks lead by 44% in single-core as 70+ OEM designs arrive.

ai.title: TSMC Q1 2026 Earnings Update
ai.description: Yesterday’s TSMC earnings call was yet another confirmation that the AI momentum right now is a one-way street: up and to the right.

ai.title: Andreessen Horowitz partner Bryan Kim departs to launch new AI
ai.description: Bryan Kim, who joined the Silicon Valley venture capital firm in November 2020, focused on consumer technology and AI applications. During his tenure at a16z, Kim led and participated in several early-stage investments, often at the seed and Series A levels.

ai.title: Jane Street Just Bought $1 Billion of CoreWeave Stock. Should You?
ai.description: A massive institutional bet is reinforcing CoreWeave’s AI infrastructure story, but valuation and execution risks still leave investors with a nuanced decision.

ai.title: Illicit drugs to be tracked in B.C. with chemical fingerprinting and AI
ai.description: Scientists and police in B.C. are working together on what they hope will be a game-changing "chemical fingerprinting" program to track the source and destination of individual batches of illicit drugs.

ai.title: Hundreds of Fake Pro-Trump Avatars Emerge on Social Media
ai.description: The artificial-intelligence-generated fake influencers have surged on TikTok, Instagram, Facebook and YouTube in an apparent bid to hook conservative voters.
